creator: domagoj.stolfa@gmail.com
text:
When one runs a command such as:

# dtrace -Z -n 'fbt:vmm::'

and after that loads the bhyve kernel module, vmm using:

# kldload vmm

the probes do not seem to fire. This seems to indicate an issue with the fbt provider in FreeBSD, as the same behaviour with different modules works fine in illumos.
